scripts.build: pnpm --filter @familytree/database build && pnpm --filter @familytree/api build && pnpm --filter @familytree/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @familytree/database lint && pnpm --filter @familytree/api lint && pnpm --filter @familytree/web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @familytree/database build && pnpm --filter @familytree/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @familytree/web typecheck
